title: CTE Supply Chain, Transportation, Manufacturing, and Engineering Teacher
status: Full Time, 1 FTEMinimum Requirements:An Active Utah Secondary Education or CTE Teaching License with applicable CTE Supply Chain and Transportation and applicable CTE Advanced Manufacturing and Engineering EndorsementFor information regarding the types of classes that may be taught under this position, please click on the following linkWCSD CTE Career Clusters, then select the position/career cluster.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. To estimate possible step placement on the TT Salary Schedule, select following linkTT Step Placement Calculator.Attachment(s):Secondary Education Teacher.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
